name: engineering-discipline
description: Codex-native engineering discipline skills and advisory hooks for risk routing, verified implementation, adversarial review, living docs, architecture, task planning, and Laravel conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Risk routing, verified implementation, adversarial review, and living docs for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native adaptation of a disciplined engineering workflow. Default hooks are advisory-only; enforcing hooks are optional.
